encounters.name: Wolf Pack
encounters.intro: Halfway down the road, the escort horses shy as a lean wolf pack ghosts out of the brush.
encounters.outcome: The caravan drives through, but one of the beasts keeps pace long enough to reach the road gate with you.

encounters.name: Bandit Ambush
encounters.intro: Halfway down the road, you hear raised voices near a broken wagon and then the rush of boots from the ditch.
encounters.outcome: The line pushes through the ambush, but one raider breaks clear and reaches the next stop still hunting for an opening.

encounters.name: Corrupted Shrine Guardian
encounters.intro: A ward-stone on the roadside cracks open with a low moan, and an old guardian shape lurches into the escort line.
encounters.outcome: The escort keeps formation and forces the thing back, but it follows the road long enough to reach your destination.

encounters.name: Rogue Construct
encounters.intro: A dormant construct on the roadside jerks awake as your convoy passes, its old directives suddenly finding a target again.
encounters.outcome: The ward-bearers buy enough time to pull ahead, but the construct reaches the staging ground behind you.

encounters.name: Traveling Merchant
encounters.rumor: A road merchant warns that Ironridge convoy work is tightening again whenever ore ledgers start going missing.
encounters.intro: A merchant wagon falls in beside your coach for a stretch, its driver eager to trade road news for a steady ear.
encounters.outcome: You part with fresher market rumor, a few honest coins, and a better name among guild teamsters.

encounters.name: Wounded Hunter
encounters.rumor: The hunter swears Ashwood packs are ranging closer to the road whenever the watch grows complacent.
encounters.intro: The caravan slows for a hunter limping in from the verge with torn leathers and a blood-dark sleeve.
encounters.outcome: The escort gets the hunter stable and sends you on with field supplies and a sharper warning about the nearby trails.

encounters.name: Shrine Pilgrim
encounters.rumor: The pilgrim says Emberfall's ward lines are holding, but only because the keepers keep choosing duty over sleep.
encounters.intro: A soot-marked pilgrim joins the convoy for a time, speaking softly about shrines that still keep their line by choice rather than ease.
encounters.outcome: By the time the road parts, your name has been carried forward with a little more favor among shrine folk.

encounters.name: Messenger Courier
encounters.intro: A hard-riding courier changes mounts beside the road and uses the pause to compare threat notices with your escort.
encounters.outcome: The courier leaves you with official thanks, a small hazard stipend, and a sharper sense of which postings matter next.

encounters.name: Abandoned Camp
encounters.rumor: The camp's scattered notes mention caravans avoiding the same road turn three nights running.
encounters.intro: The road skirts an abandoned camp whose cookfire has gone cold too recently for comfort.
encounters.outcome: The escort clears what can still be carried and leaves with useful supplies and a bad feeling about why the camp was left in such haste.

encounters.name: Strange Relic
encounters.intro: Something half-buried beside the road begins to hum as the convoy passes, old metal answering the ward-stones around it.
encounters.outcome: The escort secures the fragment for proper handling and credits you for spotting that it was more dangerous than it first looked.

encounters.name: Dead Caravan
encounters.rumor: Broken chests and axle marks suggest the raiders were after freight lists as much as coin.
encounters.intro: A dead caravan lies off the roadside with its teams cut loose and its manifest chest broken open.
encounters.outcome: The escort salvages what is still worth hauling and adds one more hard lesson to the route ledger.

encounters.name: Eerie Shrine
encounters.intro: The convoy pauses at a roadside shrine whose lamps are still lit, though no keeper seems willing to claim them.
encounters.outcome: The shrine escort marks the place for follow-up, and the road feels a little more serious once the name of the problem is spoken aloud.

encounters.name: Escort Caravan
encounters.intro: A slower freight caravan falls behind on the grade and the road officers ask your line to cover it for a stretch.
encounters.outcome: The extra escort work costs little time and leaves the guild clerks noting your name a little more favorably.

encounters.name: Help Guard Patrol
encounters.intro: A road patrol flags the convoy down long enough to sort a blocked milestone and reset the warning beacons.
encounters.outcome: The work is routine, which is exactly why the guard captain values the help.

encounters.name: Beast Hunt Request
encounters.rumor: Scouts along the way insist one disciplined beast can thin a route faster than a gang of raiders.
encounters.intro: A clan scout rides in from a side path just long enough to press fresh beast-sign reports into the convoy's hands.
encounters.outcome: The warning is too specific to ignore, and by journey's end you know which hunt is likely to matter next.

encounters.name: Message Delivery
encounters.intro: A clerk with too many sealed letters and not enough safe hands asks your line to carry one packet the rest of the way.
encounters.outcome: The message reaches the next post intact, and the sort of people who notice that kind of thing quietly do.
